query: my inventory dashboard shows On_Hand_Qty totaling 4.2 million across the whole year but we only ever stock about 30k units at a time. why is the total so inflated?
why: Balance summed across dates produces inflated total - classic semi-additive detection.

query: I have a Margin_Pct column in my Sales fact table and when I drop it on a card it shows 8000%. how should I aggregate this correctly?
why: Percentage being summed/averaged - non-additive fact needing DIVIDE of sums.

query: should I use SUM or AVERAGE for account balance in my banking model? summing across months gives nonsense numbers
why: Account balance summed across time - semi-additive aggregation choice.

query: writing a measure for average unit price across products and it looks wrong when I average the avg prices. whats the right way
why: Average of ratios vs ratio of sums - core non-additive rule.

query: headcount keeps adding up over the 12 months in my matrix visual. our company is 500 people not 6000
why: Headcount is a level captured per period - semi-additive being wrongly summed over time.

query: which fields in my model are safe to just sum everywhere and which ones break when you total them across a date axis?
why: Directly asks to classify facts by additivity behavior across dimensions.

query: I'm building a measure for inventory and want the closing balance at the end of each period instead of the sum. whats the dax pattern
why: Last/closing balance for semi-additive fact - LASTNONBLANK pattern this skill prescribes.

query: our defect rate by line is being averaged across plants and the company-wide number doesnt match. think the rate math is off
why: Rate aggregated incorrectly - non-additive fact needs numerator/denominator stored and DIVIDEd.

query: temperature readings from sensors - can I total these in a column chart by hour or is that meaningless?
why: Uncommon but valid: intensity/measure value is non-additive, cannot be summed.

query: i have an inventory fact and want to chart stock levels over time - what visual should I pick and how do i make the totals not lie?
why: Competes with visualizing-dimensional-models but the core need is correct semi-additive aggregation so totals are right; this skill wins.

query: I want to show inventory on hand trended monthly as a line chart vs a clustered column - which visual reads better for stock levels?
why: Pure visual-type selection for a metric -> mapping-questions-to-charts.

query: need a YTD and prior-year-over-year measure for revenue with a 3-month moving average
why: Time-intelligence calculations (YTD/PoP/moving avg) -> applying-time-intelligence.

query: how do I write CALCULATE with multiple filters to get net sales after returns, and a profit ratio measure?
why: General DAX measure authoring with CALCULATE/context -> authoring-dax-measures.

query: my date table relationship to the inventory fact isnt filtering right, cross-filter direction seems wrong
why: Relationship/cross-filter modeling issue -> modeling-semantic-data.

query: the model is 4GB and the report is slow when I drop the sales amount measure on a big matrix. how do I shrink it?
why: Performance/model size optimization -> optimizing-model-performance.

query: which Power BI visual best answers 'what drives high churn' - key influencers or decomposition tree?
why: AI visual selection -> ai-powered-analysis-selection.

query: I want bank branch managers to only see their own branch's account balances in the report
why: Row-level security on balances data -> securing-row-level-access.

query: set up drillthrough from the inventory summary page to a product-level detail page
why: Drill pattern design -> drill-pattern-design.

query: in Power Query I need to unpivot the monthly stock-level columns into a tidy fact table before loading
why: Data shaping/unpivot in Power Query -> transforming-data-power-query.

query: build an exec dashboard for our retail POS data with sales, margin %, and inventory KPIs laid out for leadership
why: Multi-visual dashboard layout for an audience -> dashboard-composition.
